name: Chicken Pot Pie# 2
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a baking dish well with Pam.
2. Remove the skin from the chicken breasts and cut each into several pieces.
3. Place the chicken pieces on the bottom of the baking dish.
4. Mix together the soups, broth, frozen peas, and carrots in a bowl.
5. Pour this mixture over the chicken pieces.
6. Pour milk and melted margarine into another bowl. Gradually add flour and baking powder, whisking constantly until smooth.
7. Pour this mixture over the soup layer.
8. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 1 hour. The crust will brown.
